headline: Target adds iconic assortment to product line
summary: There was a years-long period when Target was synonymous with fun. The retailer carved out a unique position in the market by blending affordability with style and making routine shopping trips anything but. A big reason Costco has remained so popular despite the fact that members have to pay ...

headline: Costco just made a household staple even better
summary: As a 20-year Costco member, I've seen my fair share of products rotate in and out of the store. And while I love the savings on groceries and everyday items I get as a member, I'm equally appreciative of the store's ever-changing inventory. Of course, sometimes, those changes can backfire. headline: P&G Targets Textured Hair And Sports Fans To Support Brand Reach
summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) is rolling out an exclusive Aussie Miracle Curls Extra Moisture Jumbo Dual Pack at Costco, focused on families with textured hair. In Canada, Tide and Downy are becoming Official Laundry Partners of the NHL under new multi-year agreements. P&G is also continuing its multi-brand partnership activity with the WNBA, expanding its sports marketing reach. For investors tracking NYSE:PG, these updates sit at the intersection of product innovation, channel expansion and...
